name: OpenCode Yantr
short_description: AI coding assistant with Docker access - manage containers from within the browser IDE.
description: OpenCode (Docker) is an AI-powered coding environment with Docker socket access. It combines browser editing and AI support with commands to build images, run containers, and manage Docker from the integrated terminal. Ideal for DevOps workflows, scripting, and container-aware development.
usecases: Code and manage Docker containers from the browser.
Build and run Docker images with AI assistance.
notes: Requires Docker installed on the host
Mounts Docker socket — grant access only to trusted users
